title: Limit at 3200 with make / integromat?
excerpt:
With Make, there is a limitation on the number of lines? 
 
 
 
The limit on the number of lines is 3200 ? impossible to get more lines ?

posts.author: YannD (Yann Dehuy)
posts.cookedHtml:
With Make, there is a limitation on the number of lines?

The limit on the number of lines is 3200 ? impossible to get more lines ?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@YannD

I often use either the monday “Execure a GraphQL Query” or general “Http” modules to get around this and other issues. Based on your question you probably would want to stick with the monday module.
